title: Spicy Thai Satay
description: A traditional Thai dish made with marinated meat skewers grilled to perfection. Serve with a side of peanut sauce for a delicious and authentic Thai experience.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together nduja, xtra, pungent, and a pinch of salt.
2. Add the syrian to the bowl and mix until well combined.
3. Thread the ingredients onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
4. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
5. Brush the skewers with the marinade and cook for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
6. Serve hot with peanut sauce and steamed vegetables.
